prompt: Frontend issue: When I try to search for a game on the home page and click 'Generate', the API returns a 500 error. The backend console shows something about Gemini, but I'm not sure what's wrong. Help me debug this step by step.

assertions.name: covers-env-var-checks
assertions.description: Response explicitly checks GEMINI_API_KEY, Supabase URL, and Supabase keys

assertions.name: provides-curl-tests
assertions.description: Includes concrete curl commands to test API endpoints in isolation

assertions.name: isolates-problem-layers
assertions.description: Clearly explains how to distinguish between frontend/backend/Gemini/Supabase failures

assertions.name: actionable-steps
assertions.description: Each step includes specific commands or checks the user can run immediately

assertions.name: explains-500-error-handling
assertions.description: Mentions not wrapping in try-catch and reading stack traces (Zero-Fat principle)
